title: chamaecytisus mollis
intro: Chamaecytisus mollis, also known as soft broom or soft downy broom, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its antitussive and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Chamaecytisus mollis include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Chamaecytisus mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in folk medicine to create tinctures and salves.
